markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Restructure the Sprint team and formalize processes to improve performance.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**NetRix is a critical risk:** A chaotic client review process is blocking content. William will escalate directly to CMO John to resolve it.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [**Sprint team goals are aggressive:** Increase weekly kickoffs to 4 (from 3) and raise the conversion rate to 80–85% (from 73% in Dec).](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [**Process overhaul is the top priority:** The team will replace the unused Linear PM tool and formalize all workflows (handoffs, reporting) to scale operations.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**William is the new team lead:** His primary role is to unblock the team, with a transition from his current EM duties over the next 1–2 months.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)

## Topics

### NetRix Client Risk

  - [**Problem:** A chaotic review process with multiple stakeholders and missing reviewers is blocking content production.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [**Impact:** This "house of cards" situation could derail the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [**Solution:** William will escalate directly to John (CMO) to force a resolution.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Proactive escalation is required to prevent a major issue in later weeks of the sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [**Immediate Action:** The team will push to start 3 articles next week to maintain momentum and demonstrate value.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)

### Sprint Team Restructuring & Goals

  - [**New Lead:** William is the new Sprint team lead, transitioning from EM duties over 1–2 months.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=381.0)
      - [**Role:** Primary unblocker for the team.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
      - [**Escalation Path:** Team → William → Panzer.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [**Hiring:** New EMs are being hired to increase team capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
  - [**Performance Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [**Kickoffs:** Increase from 3 to 4 per week.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
      - [**Conversion Rate:** Raise to 80–85% (from 73% in Dec; Jan was 100%).](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Process Overhaul: Project Management

  - [**Problem:** The current PM tool, Linear, is unused due to its complexity.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [**Solution:** Replace Linear with a user-friendly alternative.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A tool that is actually used is essential for tracking artifacts (Content OS, etc.) and scaling operations.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
      - [**Decision:** The team will research alternatives and decide next week.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [**Alternative Idea:** Build a custom tool using Claude code (Panzer's recent EM tracking tool was cited as an example).](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
      - [**Counterpoint:** A low-cost SaaS tool (\~$300/mo) is likely faster and more efficient than building from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1628.0)

### Process Overhaul: Workflows & Responsibilities

  - [**Goal:** Formalize all workflows to scale operations and reduce Aida's workload.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [**Key Areas for Improvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
      - [**ME Responsibilities:** Proactively manage content status in Airtable, check for client feedback, and update Looker dashboards.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
      - [**Weekly Updates:** MEs must provide structured updates on content status (published, in review).](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1013.0)
      - [**Handoffs:** Document all handoffs (client onboarding, sprint-to-full engagement) to prevent breakdowns.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
      - [**Templates:** Use existing templates (Marisol's scripts) for client communication.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
  - [**Automation Plan (Sydney):**](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
      - [**Draft Consolidation:** Create one channel for all drafts from Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
      - [**Status Reminders:** Send internal reminders on Wednesday/Friday for items in "production" or "client review."](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida & Kathy:** Send William a bulleted list of NetRix process issues for escalation.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [**William:**](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
      - [Strategize with Tyler on the NetRix escalation plan.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
      - [Schedule a call with John (NetRix CMO) to address process blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
      - [Share Marisol's client communication templates with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
  - [**All:** Research PM tool alternatives to Linear and present options next week.](https://fathom.video/share/iGwpzFPAfDaqx1HNrSJhU8c7xVSvoxLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
